title: Aleskonium
description: Aleskonium is a Fabric performance mod focused on smoother multiplayer client-side gameplay. It improves frame-time stability and responsiveness with adaptive optimization and compatibility-aware tuning for modern modpacks.
body:
**Aleskonium** is a Fabric performance mod focused on smoother **multiplayer client-side gameplay.**

It improves frame-time stability and responsiveness with adaptive optimization systems for rendering, networking, and runtime scheduling, while keeping strong compatibility with common performance modpacks.

**What it focuses on**
Client-side multiplayer performance first
Stable frame pacing over risky “max spike” tuning
Compatibility-aware behavior with other optimization mods
In-game configurable profiles (from safe to aggressive)

**Designed for modpacks**
Aleskonium includes compatibility guards and auto-adjustment logic to reduce overlap/conflicts with popular optimization mods.

**Environment**
Minecraft: 1.21.11
Loader: Fabric
Java: 21+
For per-update details, see the changelog/release notes.
